title: Tibber Price
description: Hourly spot price from the customer's current Tibber subscription, sourced from Nord Pool / EPEX day-ahead markets plus Tibber's tax and grid components.

total.description: Total price for the hour, including energy + tax.

startsAt.description: ISO 8601 start of the hour the price applies to.

level.description: Tibber's smart relative-price categorisation for the hour.
